[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001110 3
1 0000101 2
2 1100000 2
3 1010001 3
4 0110111 5
5 0101000 2
6 0111111 6
7 0001110 3

01 10 0100001 2
12 21 0001110 3 match 0 7
23 32 0000100 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 1000000 1
56 65 0010001 2
67 76 0000001 1
70 07 0000001 1

13 31 0000101 2 match 1
24 42 0000000 a

46 64 0100000 1

50 05 0000001 1

72 27 0001000 1
